## What this changes

<!-- One or two lines. If this adds a connector, name the tool. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] One connector or one focused change per pull request
- [ ] The connector file exports `connector` typed as `Provider`
- [ ] `npm run validate` passes locally (`tsc --noEmit`)
- [ ] At least one plain-English `ifp_rules` line, written for a human
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, client ids, or client secrets in the diff
- [ ] No em dashes or en dashes (spaced hyphens only)
